functions.title: Guide Book #73

§7Guide Book #73§r
§lElder Golem§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Golem, Earth-elemental, Magical, Monster, Boss.
•§lSpawns in§r: Deepslate Catacombs
•§lHealth§r: 480

•§lKnockback resistance§r: 1.0
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.23
•§lImmune to§r: Fire
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water, Lava, Solid Block.
•§lPossible drops§r: Stone Elder Golem Trophy, Cobbled Deepslate, Diamonds, XP Orbs.

•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Traders, Villagers, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 10-11
•Can summon 3-6 Ground Spikes around its target.
•Can break crops, plants, leaves, cobwebs, torches, &

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Elder Golem is a powerful, ancient golem found in Deepslate Catacombs. With massive health and full knockback resistance, it summons ground spikes, crushes non-solid blocks, and relentlessly attacks intruders with heavy melee blows.
